;<span id="R-Factor">R-Factor</span> (retention factor; RF)
:the number which says at which [[Glossary:U-Factor|U-Factor]] (i.e. the measure of interval increase) the [[Glossary:Measured_forgetting_index|measured forgetting index]] (i.e. the measure of forgetting) is approximated to be 10%. This number is unique for different item difficulties and for different [[Glossary:Repetition_category|repetition categories]] (i.e. the measure of [[Glossary:Stability|memory stability]]). '''R-Factors''' can be seen as a vertical green line on [[Analysis#Forgetting_Curves|forgetting curve graphs]] in [[Glossary:SuperMemo|SuperMemo]]
